John Strutt
(about 1523 – April 1591)
memoryArtifacts.description:
John Strutt was the son of Thomas and Joan Strutt. 

He was probably born in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, around 1523. 

He was a prosperous yeoman, or farmer. 

About 1540, he married Catherine, whos …

zh.lifeSummary: John Strutt是Thomas Strutt和Johane的兒子，於大約1523年出生在英國素福爾可。他於1540年與Catherine在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年4月22日在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年69歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Strutt是Thomas Strutt和Johane的儿子，于大约1523年出生在英国素福爾可。他于1540年与Catherine在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年4月22日在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年69岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Strutt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German struot, strūt ‘brush, thicket, swamp’, or a habitational name from any of several places called Struth with this word.

variants.name: Strout
meanings: English: nickname for an argumentative person, from Middle English strout, strut ‘strife, dispute, debate’ (Old English strūt).
English: from the Old Norse personal name Strútr, Strut, apparently a nickname from strútr ‘pointed hood’ (referring to a cone-like ornament on a headdress or cap).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Dutch Stroet: habitational name from Stroet in North Holland or a topographic name from Dutch stroet ‘brush, thicket, swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: John Strutt was born about 1523, in Suffolk, England as the son of Thomas Strutt and Johane. He married Catherine in 1540, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 April 1591, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Strutt est né environ 1523, à Suffolk, Angleterre, fils de Thomas Strutt et Johane. Il a épousé Catherine en 1540, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1591, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Strutt wurde um 1523 in Suffolk, England, als Sohn von Thomas Strutt und Johane geboren. Er hat 1540 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Catherine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. April 1591 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Glemsford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Strutt è nato il circa 1523 nel Suffolk, England come figlio di Thomas Strutt e Johane. Lui sposato Catherine nel 1540, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 aprile 1591, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Struttは約1523年にイギリススフォルクでThomas StruttとJohaneの息子として生まれた。1540年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでCatherineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年4月22日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで69歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクグレムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Strutt(은)는 대략 1523년 영국 수폴크에서 Thomas Strutt(와)과 Johane의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1540년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Catherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 4월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Strutt nasceu aproximadamente 1523, em Suffolk, Inglaterra filho de Thomas Strutt e Johane. Ele casou-se com Catherine em 1540, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1591, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Strutt родился около 1523 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Thomas Strutt и Johane. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine в 1540 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 апреля 1591 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Strutt nació aproximadamente 1523, en Suffolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Strutt y Johane. Se casó con Catherine en 1540, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de abril de 1591, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
